site.name: Meadow Vet Care
site.tagline: Kind care for every paw, claw & feather.
site.description: Meadow Vet Care is a modern Irish veterinary clinic offering 90+ services for dogs, cats, rabbits, small mammals and birds. Compassionate care, every visit.

seo.title: Meadow Vet Care — Modern Irish Vet Clinic for Dogs, Cats & More
seo.description: Meadow Vet Care is a modern Irish veterinary clinic offering 90+ services for dogs, cats, rabbits, small mammals and birds. Compassionate care, every visit.

og.title: Meadow Vet Care — Modern Irish Vet Clinic
og.description: 90+ services for dogs, cats, rabbits, small mammals and birds — from a friendly Irish veterinary team.

hero.headline: Kind care for every paw, claw & feather.
hero.body: Meadow Vet Care is a friendly Irish veterinary clinic offering 90+ services for dogs, cats, rabbits, small mammals and birds — with the calm, unhurried attention your pet deserves.

image.alt: Friendly Irish vet with a golden retriever puppy, a rabbit and a cat

pets.heading: From wagging tails to twitching whiskers

services.heading: Over 90 services under one welcoming roof
services.body: From routine check-ups to advanced surgery, our vets combine gentle handling with modern, evidence-based medicine.

items.title: Wellness Exams
items.desc: Nose-to-tail check-ups to keep your pet thriving year-round.

items.title: Vaccinations
items.desc: Full vaccination programmes for dogs, cats and exotic pets.

items.title: Dental Care
items.desc: Cleaning, extractions and gentle oral health treatments.

items.title: Surgery & Anaesthesia
items.desc: Modern theatres with careful monitoring at every step.

items.title: Microchipping
items.desc: Quick, painless ID so your pet always finds their way home.

items.title: Puppy & Kitten Clinics
items.desc: Early-life visits, nutrition advice and behaviour support.

about.heading: A little Irish clinic with a very big heart.
about.body: We built Meadow Vet Care around a simple idea: pets are family, and family deserves calm rooms, gentle hands, and honest advice. Our vets and nurses are trained across companion and exotic species — so whether you share your home with a Great Dane or a house rabbit, you're in expert hands.

testimonials.name: Aoife M., Dublin
testimonials.quote: The team treated Bailey like family. Calm, kind and genuinely brilliant vets.

testimonials.name: Cillian O., Wicklow
testimonials.quote: Booked online in 2 minutes. Luna's usually terrified of vets — she actually purred!

testimonials.name: Saoirse K., Bray
testimonials.quote: Finally a clinic that really understands rabbits. Thoughtful, thorough and gentle.

visit.heading: Book a friendly, unhurried visit today.
visit.body: Same-day and evening appointments available. New patients always welcome.

footer.copyright: Meadow Vet Care. Made with care in Ireland.
